RuleSet.Name: src/Schema/ISchemaTableFactory.java
RuleSet.GenRule: $switch HasSuperClassRelation no declNewPKey default empty$$switch HasSuperClassRelation no declNewHPKey default empty$$iterate Index( each declNewNonPrimaryIndexKey )$$declNewBuff$$declNewHBuff$
$switch HasDefSchema default empty no reallyDeclNewPKey empty empty$
$switch HasDefSchema default empty no reallyDeclNewHPKey empty empty$
